name: brainx
description: Connect Codex to BrainX notes through the BrainX MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Search, read, and create BrainX notes from Codex.
interface.longDescription: BrainX connects Codex to your BrainX workspace notes through the public BrainX MCP endpoint. Sign in with OAuth, then use it to search your notes, read note details, and create new notes.
defaultPrompt: Search my BrainX notes for project context.
Create a BrainX note from this draft.
